<?php /** * EC Parameters * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> * @copyright 2015 Jim Wigginton * @license http://www.opensource.org/licenses/mit-license.html MIT License * @link http://phpseclib.sourceforge.net */ namespace phpseclib3\Crypt\EC; use phpseclib3\Crypt\EC; /** * EC Parameters * * @author Jim Wigginton <terrafrost@php.net> */ final class Parameters extends EC { /** * Returns the parameters * * @param string $type * @param array $options optional * @return string */ public function toString($type = 'PKCS1', array $options = []) { $type = self::validatePlugin('Keys', 'PKCS1', 'saveParameters'); return $type::saveParameters($this->curve, $options); } }
